description: Style NoteCreated for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche.Heel: 5.5 cmProduct DetailsSilver straps beaded strap at midfoot and toe holdBrown footbed with embossed brandingTPU outsoleShort heel with heel capMaterial and CareWipe with damp cloth to remove dust
